summary: Frontend-only responsive testing completed for ALMA Machines-Outils. Tested mobile (390x844), tablet (834x1194), and desktop (1920x1080) viewports. All responsive features working correctly: hero section with stacked/side-by-side CTAs, bento grid adapting to screen size, mobile menu with expandable Gammes submenu, horizontal scroll filters on Brands page, 2-column footer on mobile, touch targets meeting 44px minimum.
critical_code_review_comments: CSS includes proper iOS safe-area-inset padding in body
100dvh used for hero section height (iOS Safari fix)
Touch targets set to min 44px via CSS
Hover effects disabled on touch devices via @media (hover: none)
Input font-size 16px to prevent iOS zoom on focus
seed_data_creation: None - all data is static in JSON files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive testing completed for all viewports. Mobile menu, bento grids, filters, and footer all adapt correctly. iOS optimizations (safe-area, dvh, touch targets) implemented in index.css.

mobile_homepage_hero.details: Hero section displays correctly with stacked CTA buttons (flex-col), video background, title with orange accent

mobile_homepage_bento.details: Bento grid cards stack vertically (grid-cols-1), Usinage large card, Tôlerie/Chaudronnerie cards, Partners card

mobile_menu_open_close.details: Hamburger menu opens full-screen overlay, X button closes, all navigation links visible

mobile_menu_gammes_expand.details: Gammes submenu expands on click showing Usinage, Tôlerie, Chaudronnerie, Menuiserie with descriptions

mobile_blog_page.details: Header with categories in horizontal scroll, article cards stacked vertically with category badges and reading times

mobile_brands_page.details: Search bar, filter buttons in horizontal scroll (Toutes, Usinage, Tôlerie, Chaudronnerie), brand cards stacked

mobile_brands_filter.details: Tôlerie filter works correctly, shows 2 brands (PHENIX, ROTY) with logos and category badges

mobile_brand_detail.details: Breadcrumb navigation, logo, category badge, description, machine count displayed correctly

mobile_footer.details: 2-column grid layout, Nos Gammes and Navigation sections, contact info, social links (LinkedIn, WhatsApp)

tablet_homepage_hero.details: CTA buttons side by side (sm:flex-row), video background, proper spacing

tablet_homepage_bento.details: Bento grid 2 columns (sm:grid-cols-2), Usinage large card spans 2 cols, Tôlerie/Chaudronnerie side by side

tablet_blog_page.details: Article cards in 2-column bento layout with varying sizes (large, medium, small)

tablet_brands_page.details: Brand cards in 2-column bento layout with logos, descriptions, machine counts

touch_targets_44px.details: All visible buttons and links meet 44px minimum height/width requirement

ios_safe_areas.details: Header at top=0 (not cut off), body has safe-area-inset padding in CSS, hero uses 100dvh
